title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Samsung R&D India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
